mapper.sql: id, transaction_no, type, item_code, item_name, quantity, operator, transaction_date, remark
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM tbl_warehouse_transaction
1 = 1
AND type = #{type}
AND item_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{itemName}, '%')
ORDER BY transaction_date DESC

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tbl_warehouse_transaction
1 = 1
AND type = #{type}
AND item_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{itemName}, '%')
SELECT transaction_no FROM tbl_warehouse_transaction WHERE transaction_no LIKE CONCAT(#{datePrefix}, '%') ORDER BY transaction_no DESC LIMIT 1
